kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=parabank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

test.name: TC-E2E-02

kw.name: Open Application And Login
Open Application
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Opens browser and navigate to application page

kw.name: Login

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Logs in user
Opens application and logs in

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

Log To Console

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Checks response code

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Validating transaction history contains entry of transfer amount: 120

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser

test.doc: Verify E2E funds transfer and API transaction history validation
